# `api.rfq.accept`

> `POST /rfq/{rfqId}/accept` — ACPortal

**Python**

```python
api.rfq.accept(rfq_id: str, *, data: AcceptModel | dict) -> None
```

**CLI**

```bash
ab rfq accept <rfq_id> [--data ...]
```

POST /rfq/{rfqId}/accept.

Args:
    rfq_id: RFQ identifier.
    data: Acceptance payload.
        Accepts an :class:`AcceptModel` instance or a dict.

Request model: :class:`AcceptModel`

## Request body — `AcceptModel`

| Field | Type | Required | Description |
|---|---|---|---|
| `notes` | `Optional[str]` | no | Acceptance notes or comment text |

## Response

No response body.
